---
title: '`syncweaver deps select-update-paths`'
---

Filter the set of candidate source paths in a host repository and emit the
selection metadata needed to drive an automated update matrix.

## Usage

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run

help_text = shell_run("syncweaver deps select-update-paths --help")
print("```")
print(help_text)
print("```")
```

## Examples

```sh
# Emit update-path selection for a host repository
syncweaver deps select-update-paths
```
